title: PumpFun Token Launches
author: swarming-team
description: Real-time visualization of PumpFun token launches on Solana. Watch new tokens appear as nodes with market cap, volume, and holder count driving the force graph.

title: Kubernetes Cluster Monitor
author: swarming-team
description: Visualize pod deployments, service meshes, and cluster topology in real-time. Nodes represent pods, edges show network connections between services.

title: GitHub Activity Stream
author: swarming-team
description: Watch GitHub events flow in real-time. Repositories as central nodes, contributors orbiting around them, PRs and issues as animated connections.

title: Social Network Graph
author: swarming-team
description: Map social connections and influence propagation across a network. See how information flows through communities with real-time edge animations.

title: AI Agent Swarm
author: swarming-team
description: Observe autonomous AI agents coordinating tasks. Each agent is a node, tool calls are edges, and the graph evolves as agents spawn sub-agents and share context.

title: IoT Sensor Mesh
author: swarming-team
description: Monitor a distributed sensor network. Temperature, humidity, and pressure readings visualized as node properties with anomaly detection highlighting outliers.

title: Ethereum Mempool Explorer
author: 0xVisu
description: Pending transactions visualized by gas price and value. Watch MEV bots compete in real-time as transactions flow from mempool to block inclusion.

title: CI/CD Pipeline Flow
author: devops-dash
description: GitHub Actions and GitLab CI pipelines as flowing graphs. Jobs are nodes, dependencies are edges, with real-time status updates as builds progress.

title: Farcaster Social Graph
author: fc-labs
description: Farcaster protocol social connections mapped in 3D. Follow relationships, channel memberships, and cast interactions as a living network.

title: Smart Home Digital Twin
author: home-viz
description: A digital twin of a smart home. Devices as nodes, automations as edges, with real-time state updates flowing through the network.

title: LLM Reasoning Traces
author: trace-viz
description: Visualize chain-of-thought reasoning in large language models. Each reasoning step is a node, with branching paths showing alternative reasoning strategies.
